metadata.persona_summary: Procurement Lead at slipping deal blocked on vendor consolidation

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: What's the status of the evaluation from your side?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: Stuck after the business case review.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: What blocked it at that stage?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: We're consolidating vendors. To add another vendor we need stronger ROI evidence than the team brought.

tool_call.output_summary: CRM notes show vendor-consolidation objection and no procurement-approved exception.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: The CRM confirms a consolidation policy. Is the policy absolute, or could a strong ROI case override it?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: An exception exists but the bar is high. The team didn't meet it.

expected_response.persona_summary: Procurement Lead at slipping deal blocked on vendor consolidation

evidence.quote: We're consolidating vendors. To add another vendor we need stronger ROI evidence than the team brought.
An exception exists but the bar is high. The team didn't meet it.
we need stronger ROI evidence than the team brought.
